events.summary: v7.6 Mechanical Enforcement implementation begins. User approved all 4 sub-questions: (A) hard-block from day 1, (All) ship 1a+1b+1c+1d together, (V7.6) framework version bump, (After live) public Tier 3.3 issue. Resume from 2026-04-24 paused work — 1a+1b drafted in check-state-schema.py working tree.

1a (PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG) and 1b (PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_TIMING) implemented in scripts/check-state-schema.py. Helpers added: _feature_slug_from_path, _load_committed_state, _parse_iso, _load_feature_log, _recent_phase_event. validate_file() gained enforce_transition kwarg; main() passes True only in --staged mode. 1a verified end-to-end: synthetic phase advance without log event fires the check with clear remediation message.

Phase 1 (Class B → A) complete: 4 new write-time defenses shipped — PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_LOG (1a) + PHASE_TRANSITION_NO_TIMING (1b) in check-state-schema.py; BROKEN_PR_CITATION (1c) + CASE_STUDY_MISSING_TIER_TAGS (1d) in new check-case-study-preflight.py. Pre-commit hook updated to invoke both checkers. Pipeline regression test extended from 11 to 15 assertions, all green. Phase 2-4 detailed plan archived for execution.

Phase 2b: extended scripts/measurement-adoption-report.py with append_history_snapshot() — dedup-by-date, atomic write, --history-output + --snapshot-trigger CLI flags. Verified: first run appends, second run on same date skips.

cache_hit.skill: v7.5 documentation-debt-history pattern: same dedup-by-date rule, same atomic-write idiom

events.summary: Phase 2c: created .github/workflows/framework-status-weekly.yml — weekly cron (Mondays 05:00 UTC) that snapshots measurement-adoption history, runs documentation-debt readout, compares vs prior snapshot, opens issue on regression. Observational-only; never blocks merges. Mirrors integrity-cycle.yml structure for consistency.

cache_hit.skill: Reused integrity-cycle.yml shape: cron + workflow_dispatch, env-routed dynamic values, github-script for issue creation, GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY block. Adapted regression detection from integer-delta comparison instead of grep on report text.

events.summary: Phase 3a+3b: created docs/case-studies/meta-analysis/unclosable-gaps.md (5 Class B gaps, 4-section format each, Class A vs B promotion table). Updated CLAUDE.md with v7.6 write-time gates (4 new check codes), per-PR + weekly defenses block, and Known Mechanical Limits section linking to unclosable-gaps.md.

Phase 4a-4e: bumped framework-manifest.json to v7.6 (1.7→1.8) with full v7_6_mechanical_enforcement block (write_time_defenses, per_pr_and_weekly_defenses, unclosable_gaps_class_b, aggregate, policy_decisions_continued, tooling_attribution); wrote 616-line Dev-style case study (mechanical-enforcement-v7-6-case-study.md) covering full T1/T2/T3 arc, comprehensive CU+workload analysis with explicit outlier caveat, Codex tooling attribution; updated evolution.md (header + table row), .claude/integrity/README.md, repo-root mirrors (project_gemini_audit_2026_04_21.md, project_framework_v7_1_integrity_cycle.md), MEMORY.md index, created project_mechanical_enforcement_v7_6.md memory entry, appended v7.6 hand-off to project_data_integrity_framework_v7_5.md memory.
